generated_oml:
instance GantryCraneSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors in the mechanical structure and controller of the lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneStateData
]

instance GantryCraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneSensors
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data of gantry crane including position, velocity, and control signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicalCraneInterface, TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based interface for collecting data from physical gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing historical crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker for real-time signaling between digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard tool for real-time data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance InfluxDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for sensor data storage in GreenhouseDT system"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictionService
]

instance ActiveMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for real-time communication in GreenhouseDT"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictionService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control system for digital twin model management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelVersioningService
]

instance GantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python C4 Containers module for architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables C4Model
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterface, TimescaleDB, Grafana, MQTTBroker, InfluxDB, ActiveMQ, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService, OptimalControlService, SimulationService, PredictionService, ModelVersioningService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical crane state data for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of gantry crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of digital twin against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting faults in gantry crane system operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of gantry crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for scenario analysis and simulation in air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:provides Simulation
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for future state forecasting in air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:provides Prediction
]

instance ModelVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control of digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelVersioningInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of historical system data for analysis and validation"
]

instance RuntimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane system status through dashboards"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison between physical and digital twin states for validation"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of anomalies and faults in system behavior"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control actions to optimize system performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Scenario analysis for virus spread prevention in indoor air quality management"
]

instance Prediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Future state forecasting for indoor air quality management"
]

instance ModelVersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking and managing versions of digital twin models"
]

instance BehavioralAdaptationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for physical greenhouse and digital twin counterpart"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDB, ActiveMQ
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture visualization model for lab-scale gantry crane using C4 methodology"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]

instance GreenhouseDTVM : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Virtual machine hosting prerecorded datasets for GreenhouseDT simulation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are generated by the Control Application and transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is described using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, featuring components including Physical Crane (actual system), Control Application, Trajectory Generator Service, and other software containers with defined interactions and dependencies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security details are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on a personal computer with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. Computational requirements, scalability mechanisms, and other deployment specifics are not mentioned in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to AutomationML (an international standard for automation systems) for modeling the digital twin, while the Lab Scale Gantry Crane uses the C4 Model for architectural description. However, most exemplars adopt ad-hoc implementations without formal compliance to broader industry standards beyond these specific modeling tools."
]
